{{Quote|The ship's all yours. If the scanners pick up anything, report it immediately. All right, let's go.|Stormtrooper|<ref name="Episode 4">{{Film|IV}}</ref>}}
This '''stormtrooper''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] stationed aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], who participated in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]{{'s}} capture and ordered a scanning crew to board the ship and check it. Not too long afterward, the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] commenced, with the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] destruction.

==Appearances==
*{{Film|IV}} {{1st}}
